LanguageData.Isekai_Warrior.label: Warrior
LanguageData.Isekai_Mage.label: Mage
LanguageData.Isekai_Ranger.label: Ranger
LanguageData.Isekai_Crafter.label: Crafter
LanguageData.Isekai_Leader.label: Leader
LanguageData.Skill_IronSkin.label: Iron Skin
LanguageData.Skill_BladeMastery.label: Blade Mastery
LanguageData.Skill_Berserker.label: Berserker
LanguageData.Skill_CriticalStrike.label: Critical Strike
LanguageData.Skill_Unstoppable.label: Unstoppable
LanguageData.Skill_Meditation.label: Meditation
LanguageData.Skill_ArcaneShield.label: Arcane Shield
LanguageData.Skill_Teleport.label: Teleport
LanguageData.Skill_EagleEye.label: Eagle Eye
LanguageData.Skill_QuickDraw.label: Quick Draw
LanguageData.Skill_Evasion.label: Evasion
LanguageData.Skill_Swiftness.label: Swiftness
LanguageData.Skill_EfficientWork.label: Efficient Work
LanguageData.Skill_MasterCrafter.label: Master Crafter
LanguageData.Skill_Charisma.label: Charisma
LanguageData.Skill_Inspiration.label: Inspiration
LanguageData.Skill_NegotiationMaster.label: Negotiation Master
LanguageData.Skill_Regeneration.label: Regeneration
LanguageData.Skill_Vitality.label: Vitality
LanguageData.Ability_Berserk.label: Berserk
LanguageData.Ability_Shield.label: Arcane Shield
LanguageData.Ability_Regeneration.label: Regeneration
LanguageData.Ability_Haste.label: Haste
LanguageData.Ability_Inspire.label: Inspire
LanguageData.Ability_Teleport.label: Teleport
LanguageData.Ability_CriticalStrike.label: Critical Strike
LanguageData.Ability_Lifesteal.label: Lifesteal
LanguageData.Isekai_Berserk.label: berserk rage
LanguageData.Isekai_Shield.label: arcane shield
LanguageData.Isekai_Regeneration.label: regenerating
LanguageData.Isekai_Haste.label: haste
LanguageData.Isekai_Inspired.label: inspired
LanguageData.Isekai_Awakening.label: isekai awakening
LanguageData.IsekaiLevelUpMessage: {0} has reached level {1}! They have {2} skill point(s) to spend.
LanguageData.Isekai_AutoAssign_Tooltip: Automatically distribute all available points proportionally based on current stat ratios.
LanguageData.Isekai_Desc_STR:
Physical power and raw muscle.

Affects:
• Melee Damage
• Carry Capacity
LanguageData.Isekai_Desc_DEX:
Agility and precision.

Affects:
• Move Speed
• Melee Dodge Chance
• Shooting Accuracy
• Melee Hit Chance
• Aiming Delay
LanguageData.Isekai_Desc_VIT:
Constitution and toughness.

Affects:
• Max Health
• Health Regen
• Toxic Resistance
• Incoming Damage Reduction
• Natural Armor (Sharp/Blunt/Heat)
• Pain Shock Threshold
• Rest Rate
• Lifespan
• Neural Heat Limit (with WIS)
LanguageData.Isekai_Desc_INT:
Mental acuity and learning.

Affects:
• Work Speed
• Research Speed
• Learning Speed
• Crafting Quality
• Hacking Speed
• Psychic Sensitivity (with WIS)
LanguageData.Isekai_Desc_WIS:
Insight and mental fortitude.

Affects:
• Mental Break Threshold
• Meditation Focus Gain
• Medical Tend Quality
• Surgery Success
• Train Animal Chance
• Animal Gather Yield
• Psychic Sensitivity (with INT)
• Neural Heat Limit (with VIT)
• Neural Heat Recovery
• Psyfocus Efficiency
LanguageData.Isekai_Desc_CHA:
Social influence and presence.

Affects:
• Social Impact
• Negotiation Ability
• Trade Prices
• Tame Animal Chance
• Arrest Success Chance
LanguageData.Isekai_Desc_DEX_RoM:
[RoM]
• Stamina Regen
• Might Cooldown
• Stamina Cost
LanguageData.Isekai_Desc_INT_RoM:
[RoM]
• Max Mana
• Magic Cooldown
• Max Psionic Energy
LanguageData.Isekai_Desc_WIS_RoM:
[RoM]
• Mana Regen
• Magic Damage (Arcane)
• Mana Cost
LanguageData.Isekai_Desc_VIT_Short: Health regen • Damage resist • Armor • Lifespan
LanguageData.Isekai_Passive_MeleePower_Desc: Derived from Strength. Increases melee attack damage.
LanguageData.Isekai_Passive_Toughness_Desc: Derived from Vitality. Increases damage resistance and durability.
LanguageData.Isekai_Passive_Evasion_Desc: Derived from Dexterity. Increases dodge chance and agility.
LanguageData.Isekai_Passive_Focus_Desc: Derived from Intelligence. Increases work efficiency and precision.
LanguageData.Isekai_Passive_Insight_Desc: Derived from Wisdom. Increases healing and spiritual awareness.
LanguageData.Isekai_Passive_Presence_Desc: Derived from Charisma. Increases social impact and leadership.
LanguageData.Isekai_Settings_RestartWarning: ⚠ Note: Most settings require a game restart to take full effect.
LanguageData.Isekai_Settings_EnableXPNotifications_De: Show floating text when pawns gain XP
LanguageData.Isekai_Settings_EnableLevelUpNotificatio: Show letter notifications when pawns level up
LanguageData.Isekai_Settings_UseLevelUpNotice_Desc: Show a small corner notice instead of a letter for level up notifications. Less intrusive for frequent level ups.
LanguageData.Isekai_Settings_MaxStatCap_Desc: Maximum value any stat (STR, VIT, DEX, etc.) can reach. Set to 9999 for unlimited.
LanguageData.Isekai_Settings_StartingLevel_Desc: Starting level for new colonists. Set to 0 for random rank-based generation (default). Higher values give your colonists a head start. Adjust before starting a new game.
LanguageData.Isekai_Settings_NewbornsUseRankRolling_D: When enabled, newborn babies use the same random rank rolling as other pawns instead of starting at level 1 / F-rank. Off by default — babies start blank and grow through XP.
LanguageData.Isekai_Settings_ShowMobRanks_Desc: Display rank information in mob inspect panels
LanguageData.Isekai_Settings_ExcludeAnimals_Desc: When enabled, animals will not receive mob ranks or rank-based stat bonuses. They will behave as vanilla.
LanguageData.Isekai_Settings_ExcludeMechs_Desc: When enabled, mechanoids will not receive mob ranks or rank-based stat bonuses. They will behave as vanilla.
LanguageData.Isekai_Settings_ExcludeEntities_Desc: When enabled, Anomaly DLC entities (sightstealers, revenants, shamblers, chimeras, etc.) will not receive mob ranks or rank-based stat bonuses. They will behave as vanilla.
LanguageData.Isekai_Settings_TamedBonusRetention_Desc: How much of their rank bonuses (HP, armor, speed, damage, pain threshold) tamed animals keep. 0% = no bonuses (vanilla stats), 50% = half bonuses, 100% = full bonuses as if still wild.
LanguageData.Isekai_Settings_MobSpeedMultiplier_Desc: Controls how much ranked mobs get speed bonuses. 0.0 = no speed bonus, 1.0 = default (S=+50%), 2.0 = double bonus (S=+100%)
LanguageData.Isekai_Settings_MobArmorMultiplier_Desc: Controls how much ranked mobs get armor bonuses. 0.0 = no armor bonus, 1.0 = default (S=+90%), 2.0 = double bonus (S=+180%)
LanguageData.Isekai_Settings_MobHealthMultiplier_Desc: Controls how much ranked mobs get health bonuses. 0.0 = no health bonus (vanilla HP), 1.0 = default (S=5x), 2.0 = double bonus (S=9x)
LanguageData.Isekai_Settings_MobRankValueMultiplier_D: Controls how much ranked mobs get market value bonuses. 0.0 = no value bonus, 1.0 = default (SSS=10x), 2.0 = double bonus (SSS=19x)
LanguageData.Isekai_Settings_PawnLevelValueMultiplier: Controls how much pawn levels affect market value. 0.0 = no value bonus, 1.0 = default (high level = 5x), 2.0 = double bonus (high level = 9x)
LanguageData.Isekai_Settings_EnableRaidRanking_Desc: Assign ranks to raid enemies based on raid strength
LanguageData.Isekai_Settings_RaidPointsMultiplier_Des: Lower = weaker raids. Reduce this if enemies are too strong for your colony.
LanguageData.Isekai_Settings_RaidRankCapAtS_Desc: Normal raids max at S rank (SS/SSS reserved for special events)
LanguageData.Isekai_Settings_MaxRaidRank_Desc: Maximum rank that can appear in normal raids. Lower this if high-rank raiders are overwhelming you. SS/SSS are always reserved for quests and special events.
LanguageData.Isekai_Settings_ClassicRNGRaids_Desc: Use classic chaotic variance - raids can be much stronger or weaker than expected. More exciting but can overwhelm early colonies!
LanguageData.Isekai_Settings_AdaptiveRaidRanks_Desc: Clamp raid enemy ranks to within ±1 of your colony's strongest pawn. Prevents S-rank enemies from appearing in a new colony and D-rank threats in a late-game colony. Off by default.
LanguageData.Isekai_Settings_EnableMechanitorXP_Desc: Mechanitors receive XP when their controlled mechs deal damage or kill enemies
LanguageData.Isekai_Settings_EnableMechCreatureXP_Des: When disabled, mechanoid creatures will not gain any XP from combat, kills, or quest rewards. They will still receive rank injection but won't level up.
LanguageData.Isekai_AutoAssign_Desc: Automatically distribute all available stat points. If a class is assigned, points are weighted towards the class's primary and secondary stats. Otherwise, points are distributed evenly.
LanguageData.Isekai_AutoDistribute_Desc: When enabled, stat points are automatically distributed on level-up. If a class is assigned, points are weighted towards primary and secondary stats. Otherwise, points are spread evenly.
LanguageData.Isekai_Settings_ShareKillXPAcrossMaps_De: When enabled, pawns who dealt damage to an enemy receive kill XP even if they are on a different map tile. When disabled, only pawns on the same map as the victim get kill XP. Mechanitor XP is not affected by this setting.
LanguageData.Isekai_Settings_EnableGuildQuests_Desc: Daily hunt quests with ranked creatures and rewards
LanguageData.Isekai_Settings_GuildQuestFrequency_Desc: How often new guild quests appear
LanguageData.Isekai_Settings_MaxActiveGuildQuests_Des: Maximum number of guild quests that can be waiting in the Available tab at once. New quests won't appear until old ones are accepted or expire.
LanguageData.Isekai_Settings_MinQuestRank_Desc: Quests below this rank will not appear. Useful for reducing quest tab clutter at higher levels.
LanguageData.Isekai_Settings_ShowEliteMobTitles_Desc: Display elite mob name plates, health bars, and hover effects. Disabling this completely skips all per-frame overlay checks, improving performance.
LanguageData.Isekai_Settings_EnableTraitColors_Desc: Color isekai trait names by rarity in the character card (Gold = archetype, Purple = rare, Green = uncommon, Red = curse). Disable for plain white labels.
LanguageData.Isekai_Settings_QuestBlacklistDesc: Exclude creatures from specific mods from appearing as quest targets. Enter comma-separated keywords that match the mod's name or package ID.
LanguageData.Isekai_Settings_QuestBlacklistHint: Example: "ayameduki, alpha animals" — partial matches work. Check your mod list for the exact mod name.
LanguageData.Isekai_Settings_QuestBlacklistBuiltIn: Built-in exclusions (always active): Anomaly DLC entities, A RimWorld of Magic summons/constructs, larvae, vehicles.
LanguageData.Isekai_Settings_ResetStatMultipliers: Reset All Stat Multipliers to Defaults
LanguageData.Isekai_Settings_WindowPositionReset: Stats window position reset to center.
LanguageData.Isekai_Settings_WindowPositionDesc: The Stats window can be dragged by clicking and holding the top area. Your position is saved automatically. Use the button below to reset to center if needed.
LanguageData.Isekai_Settings_UseIsekaiUI_Desc: Use the custom themed Isekai interface for status tabs and panels. Disable to use standard vanilla RimWorld UI style.
LanguageData.Isekai_Settings_EnableManaCoreDrops_Desc: Toggle mana crystal drops from all ranked creatures (D rank and above). Uncheck to disable all mana core loot.
LanguageData.Isekai_Settings_AutoAllowCrystalHauling_: When enabled, mana cores and star fragments spawn allowed for hauling instead of forbidden. Useful for peaceful/community builder playstyles where pawns won't run into danger.
LanguageData.Isekai_ManaCore_NoPawn: This pawn cannot absorb mana cores.
LanguageData.Isekai_Settings_DraftedAuraSubtext: Vertical energy flames with glow and particles
LanguageData.Isekai_Settings_EnableDraftedAura_Desc: Show energy aura around drafted pawns (B rank and above only)
LanguageData.Isekai_Settings_AuraUseFavoriteColor_Des: When enabled, aura color will match the pawn's favorite color instead of the rank-based color scheme. Great for personal flair!
LanguageData.Isekai_Difficulty_D: Recommended: D-Rank adventurer or a small party.
LanguageData.Isekai_Difficulty_C: Recommended: C-Rank adventurer or a well-equipped party.
LanguageData.Isekai_Difficulty_B: Recommended: B-Rank party with proper gear.
LanguageData.Isekai_Difficulty_A: Recommended: A-Rank party or multiple B-Rank adventurers.
LanguageData.Isekai_Difficulty_S: Required: Full party of A-Rank adventurers minimum.
LanguageData.Isekai_Difficulty_SS: Required: Multiple S-Rank adventurers working together.
LanguageData.Isekai_Difficulty_SSS: Required: Elite team of S-Rank adventurers. Legendary threat.
LanguageData.Isekai_Quest_Offer_Text_Hunt:
<color=#FFD700>━━━ ADVENTURER'S GUILD ━━━</color>
A new hunt contract has been posted!
Target: {1} Threat Level: {0}-Rank Bounty: {3} silver + {2} XP
<color=#888888>Difficulty: Suitable for beginner to intermediate adventurers.</color>
<color=#999999>The Guild has marked this creature for elimination. A simple job for aspiring hunters.</color>
<color=#666666>— Sent by the Adventurer's Guild</color>
LanguageData.Isekai_Quest_Description_Hunt:
<color=#FFD700>━━━ HUNT CONTRACT ━━━</color>
Target: {1} ({0}-Rank)
<color=#888888>⚔ Difficulty: Suitable for beginner to intermediate adventurers. Any colonist with basic combat training can handle this.</color>
Mission Briefing: A creature has been reported in the area. The Guild is offering a bounty for its elimination.
Upon Completion: • {2} XP distributed among all hunters • {3} Silver bounty payment • Additional loot from the creature
Accept this contract to summon the target to your hunting grounds.
<color=#666666>— Adventurer's Guild</color>
LanguageData.Isekai_Hunt_Started_Hunt: [GUILD] Hunt contract activated! Your target {1} ({0}-Rank) awaits.
LanguageData.Isekai_Hunt_Complete_Text_Hunt:
<color=#FFD700>━━━ CONTRACT FULFILLED ━━━</color>
Well done, Hunter!
You have successfully eliminated the {0}-Rank target.
Rewards Claimed: • {1} XP <color=#888888>(distributed among colonists)</color> • {2} silver
<color=#999999>The Guild takes note of your growing skill.</color>
<color=#666666>— Sent by the Adventurer's Guild</color>
LanguageData.Isekai_Quest_Offer_Text_Expedition:
<color=#FFD700>━━━ ADVENTURER'S GUILD ━━━</color>
An expedition contract has been issued!
Target: {1} Threat Level: {0}-Rank Bounty: {3} silver + {2} XP
<color=#FFAA00>⚔ Difficulty: Recommended for B-Rank parties or multiple experienced adventurers.</color>
<color=#999999>This creature has established territory beyond your borders. The Guild seeks experienced hunters willing to form an expedition and eliminate this threat.</color>
<color=#666666>— Sent by the Adventurer's Guild</color>
LanguageData.Isekai_Quest_Description_Expedition:
<color=#FFD700>━━━ EXPEDITION CONTRACT ━━━</color>
Target: {1} ({0}-Rank) Location: ~{4} tiles away
<color=#FFAA00>⚔ Difficulty: Recommended for B-Rank adventurers or higher. Send a well-equipped party — solo attempts are risky.</color>
Mission Briefing: A powerful creature has established territory in a distant region. The Guild is offering a substantial bounty for hunters willing to travel and eliminate this threat.
Upon Completion: • {2} XP distributed among all hunters • {3} Silver bounty payment • Additional loot from the creature
Form a caravan and travel to the marked location. The expedition begins upon arrival.
<color=#666666>— Adventurer's Guild</color>
LanguageData.Isekai_Hunt_Started_Expedition: [GUILD] Expedition contract activated! The {1} ({0}-Rank) awaits at the marked location.
LanguageData.Isekai_Hunt_SiteRevealed_Expedition: [GUILD] Contract accepted! The {1} ({0}-Rank) has been located. Form an expedition party and travel to the marked location.
LanguageData.Isekai_Hunt_Complete_Text_Expedition:
<color=#FFD700>━━━ EXPEDITION SUCCESSFUL ━━━</color>
Excellent work, Adventurer!
Your expedition has successfully eliminated the {0}-Rank target.
Rewards Claimed: • {1} XP <color=#888888>(distributed among colonists)</color> • {2} silver
<color=#999999>Your reputation with the Guild grows stronger. More challenging contracts await.</color>
<color=#666666>— Sent by the Adventurer's Guild</color>
LanguageData.Isekai_Quest_Offer_Text_Raid:
<color=#FFD700>━━━ ADVENTURER'S GUILD ━━━</color>
<color=#FF4444>⚠ URGENT: RAID CONTRACT ISSUED ⚠</color>
Target: {1} Threat Level: {0}-Rank (EXTREME DANGER) Bounty: {3} silver + {2} XP
<color=#FF6666>⚔ DIFFICULTY WARNING ⚔ S-Rank: Requires a full party of A-Rank adventurers. SS-Rank: Requires multiple S-Rank adventurers. SSS-Rank: Requires an elite team of S-Rank adventurers. Legendary threat!</color>
<color=#999999>A legendary creature terrorizes the region. The Guild issues this contract only to the most elite hunters. Assemble your strongest warriors — this is not a hunt, this is a raid.</color>
<color=#666666>— Sent by the Adventurer's Guild High Council</color>
LanguageData.Isekai_Quest_Description_Raid:
<color=#FFD700>━━━ RAID CONTRACT ━━━</color>
<color=#FF4444>THREAT LEVEL: EXTREME</color>
Target: {1} ({0}-Rank) Location: ~{4} tiles away
<color=#FF6666>⚔ DIFFICULTY REQUIREMENTS ⚔ • S-Rank Raid: Full party of A-Rank adventurers minimum. • SS-Rank Raid: Multiple S-Rank adventurers working together. • SSS-Rank Raid: Elite team of S-Rank adventurers required. This is a legendary threat — prepare accordingly!</color>
Mission Briefing: A legendary creature of immense power has been sighted. This is not a mere hunt — it is a raid against one of the most dangerous beings in the known world. Only the mightiest hunters should attempt this contract.
Upon Completion: • {2} XP distributed among all hunters • {3} Silver bounty payment • Legendary loot from the creature
Assemble your elite warriors. Bring your finest weapons and armor. Victory will cement your legend.
<color=#666666>— Adventurer's Guild High Council</color>
LanguageData.Isekai_Hunt_Started_Raid: [GUILD] ⚔ RAID CONTRACT ACTIVATED ⚔ The legendary {1} ({0}-Rank) awaits your challenge!
LanguageData.Isekai_Hunt_SiteRevealed_Raid: [GUILD] ⚔ RAID LOCATION REVEALED ⚔ The legendary {1} ({0}-Rank) awaits. Assemble your elite S-Rank warriors and march to glory!
LanguageData.Isekai_Hunt_Complete_Text_Raid:
<color=#FFD700>━━━ LEGENDARY VICTORY ━━━</color>
<color=#FFD700>★ GLORY TO THE HUNTERS ★</color>
Your raid has vanquished the legendary {0}-Rank creature!
Rewards Claimed: • {1} XP <color=#888888>(distributed among colonists)</color> • {2} silver
<color=#999999>Tales of your victory will echo through the ages. The Guild salutes your valor.</color>
<color=#666666>— Sent by the Adventurer's Guild High Council</color>
LanguageData.Isekai_Quest_Offer_Text_Bounty:
<color=#FFD700>━━━ ADVENTURER'S GUILD ━━━</color>
<color=#FF8800>⚔ BOUNTY CONTRACT ISSUED ⚔</color>
Target: {1} Threat Level: {0}-Rank Reward: {3} silver + {2} XP
<color=#FF8800>⚔ This is a hostile combatant — expect armed resistance.</color>
<color=#999999>A dangerous individual has been marked for elimination by the Guild. This target is a hostile combatant, armed and dangerous. Engage with caution.</color>
<color=#666666>— Sent by the Adventurer's Guild</color>
LanguageData.Isekai_Quest_Description_Bounty:
<color=#FFD700>━━━ BOUNTY CONTRACT ━━━</color>
<color=#FF8800>TARGET: HOSTILE COMBATANT</color>
Target: {1} ({0}-Rank)
<color=#FF8800>⚔ This target is armed and dangerous. Prepare for combat.</color>
Mission Briefing: A hostile combatant has been marked for elimination. Unlike beast hunts, this target will fight back with weapons and tactics. Approach with a well-armed party.
Upon Completion: • {2} XP distributed among all hunters • {3} Silver bounty payment • Additional loot from the target
Accept this contract to engage the bounty target.
<color=#666666>— Adventurer's Guild</color>
LanguageData.Isekai_Hunt_Started_Bounty: [GUILD] Bounty contract activated! Your target {1} ({0}-Rank) has been located.
LanguageData.Isekai_Hunt_SiteRevealed_Bounty: [GUILD] Bounty contract accepted! The target {1} ({0}-Rank) has been located. Form a hunting party and travel to the marked location.
LanguageData.Isekai_Hunt_Complete_Text_Bounty:
<color=#FFD700>━━━ BOUNTY COLLECTED ━━━</color>
Target eliminated!
You have successfully neutralized the {0}-Rank bounty target.
Rewards Claimed: • {1} XP <color=#888888>(distributed among colonists)</color> • {2} silver
<color=#999999>The Guild is impressed by your combat prowess. More bounty contracts await.</color>
<color=#666666>— Sent by the Adventurer's Guild</color>
LanguageData.Isekai_Quest_Offer_Text_BountyPack:
<color=#FFD700>━━━ ADVENTURER'S GUILD ━━━</color>
<color=#FF8800>⚔ BOUNTY CONTRACT ISSUED ⚔</color>
Target: A squad of {4} {1}s Threat Level: {0}-Rank Reward: {3} silver + {2} XP
<color=#FF8800>⚔ These are hostile combatants — expect heavy armed resistance.</color>
<color=#999999>A group of dangerous individuals has been marked for elimination by the Guild. This is a squad elimination contract — all {4} targets must be neutralized. They are armed and dangerous. Bring a well-equipped party.</color>
<color=#666666>— Sent by the Adventurer's Guild</color>
LanguageData.Isekai_Quest_Description_BountyPack:
<color=#FFD700>━━━ BOUNTY CONTRACT ━━━</color>
<color=#FF8800>TARGET: HOSTILE SQUAD ({5} COMBATANTS)</color>
Target: {5}x {1} ({0}-Rank) Distance: ~{4} tiles
<color=#FF8800>⚔ This is a squad elimination contract. All targets must be neutralized.</color>
Mission Briefing: A squad of {5} hostile combatants has been marked for elimination. Unlike solo bounties, you will face multiple armed enemies fighting as a group. Approach with a well-armed party and expect coordinated resistance.
Upon Completion: • {2} XP distributed among all hunters • {3} Silver bounty payment • Additional loot from the targets
Accept this contract to engage the bounty squad.
<color=#666666>— Adventurer's Guild</color>
LanguageData.Isekai_Hunt_SiteRevealed_BountyPack: [GUILD] Bounty contract accepted! A squad of {2} {1} ({0}-Rank) has been located. Form a hunting party and travel to the marked location.
LanguageData.Isekai_Quest_Offer_Text_ExpeditionPack:
<color=#FFD700>━━━ ADVENTURER'S GUILD ━━━</color>
An expedition contract has been issued!
Target: A pack of {4} {1}s Threat Level: {0}-Rank Bounty: {3} silver + {2} XP
<color=#FFAA00>⚔ Difficulty: Multiple creatures — recommended for B-Rank parties or higher.</color>
<color=#999999>A pack of dangerous creatures has established territory beyond your borders. The Guild seeks experienced hunters willing to form an expedition and eliminate the entire group.</color>
<color=#666666>— Sent by the Adventurer's Guild</color>
LanguageData.Isekai_Quest_Description_ExpeditionPack:
<color=#FFD700>━━━ EXPEDITION CONTRACT ━━━</color>
<color=#FFAA00>TARGET: CREATURE PACK ({5} CREATURES)</color>
Target: {5}x {1} ({0}-Rank) Location: ~{4} tiles away
<color=#FFAA00>⚔ Difficulty: Multiple creatures — send a well-equipped party. Solo attempts are extremely risky.</color>
Mission Briefing: A pack of {5} dangerous creatures has established territory in a distant region. The Guild is offering a substantial bounty for hunters willing to travel and eliminate the entire group.
Upon Completion: • {2} XP distributed among all hunters • {3} Silver bounty payment • Additional loot from the creatures
Form a caravan and travel to the marked location. The expedition begins upon arrival.
<color=#666666>— Adventurer's Guild</color>
LanguageData.Isekai_Hunt_SiteRevealed_ExpeditionPack: [GUILD] Expedition contract accepted! A pack of {2} {1} ({0}-Rank) has been located. Form an expedition party and travel to the marked location.
LanguageData.Isekai_Quest_Offer_Text:
<color=#FFD700>━━━ ADVENTURER'S GUILD ━━━</color>
A new hunt contract has been posted!
Target: {1} Threat Level: {0}-Rank Bounty: {3} silver + {2} XP
<color=#999999>The Guild has marked this creature for elimination. Accept the contract to begin your hunt.</color>
<color=#666666>— Sent by the Adventurer's Guild</color>
LanguageData.Isekai_Hunt_Deferred: Guild contract accepted. The target will appear when you arrive at a settlement.
LanguageData.Isekai_Hunt_SpawnFailed: The creature could not be located. Contract voided.
LanguageData.Isekai_Hunt_Letter_Text:
<color=#FFD700>━━━ ADVENTURER'S GUILD ━━━</color>
Your contracted target has been located!
Target: {1} Threat Level: {0}-Rank Bounty: {3} silver + {2} XP
<color=#999999>The creature is nearby but not hostile... yet. You choose when to engage. Strike when you're ready to claim your bounty.</color>
<color=#666666>— Sent by the Adventurer's Guild</color>
LanguageData.Isekai_Hunt_Complete_Text:
<color=#FFD700>━━━ CONTRACT FULFILLED ━━━</color>
Excellent work, Hunter!
You have successfully eliminated the {0}-Rank target.
Rewards Claimed: • {1} XP <color=#888888>(distributed among colonists)</color> • {2} silver
<color=#999999>Your reputation with the Guild grows stronger. More challenging contracts await.</color>
<color=#666666>— Sent by the Adventurer's Guild</color>
LanguageData.Isekai_Quest_Description:
<color=#FFD700>━━━ HUNT CONTRACT ━━━</color>
Target: {1} ({0}-Rank)
Mission Briefing: A creature has been reported in the area. The Guild is offering a bounty for its elimination.
Upon Completion: • {2} XP distributed among all hunters • {3} Silver bounty payment • Additional loot from the creature
Accept this contract to summon the target to your hunting grounds.
<color=#666666>— Adventurer's Guild</color>
LanguageData.Isekai_Quest_Description_World:
<color=#FFD700>━━━ EXPEDITION CONTRACT ━━━</color>
Target: {1} ({0}-Rank) Location: ~{4} tiles away
Mission Briefing: A powerful creature has established territory in a distant region. The Guild is offering a substantial bounty for hunters willing to travel and eliminate this threat.
Upon Completion: • {2} XP distributed among all hunters • {3} Silver bounty payment • Additional loot from the creature
Form a caravan and travel to the marked location. The mission begins upon arrival.
<color=#666666>— Adventurer's Guild</color>
LanguageData.Isekai_Quest_Local_Pending: Awaiting acceptance... Target {0} will spawn on your map.
LanguageData.Isekai_Quest_Local_Deferred: Contract accepted. {0} will spawn when you arrive at a settlement.
LanguageData.Isekai_Quest_World_Pending: Awaiting acceptance... Accept to reveal the {0}'s location.
LanguageData.Isekai_Quest_World_Travel: Travel to {0} to begin the mission.
LanguageData.Isekai_Quest_OfferExpiry_Tip: The Guild will reassign this contract if not accepted in time.
LanguageData.Isekai_Quest_Expiry_Tip: The Guild requires timely completion of accepted contracts. Failure to complete within the deadline will result in contract cancellation.
LanguageData.Isekai_Hunt_SiteRevealed: [GUILD] Contract accepted! The {1} ({0}-Rank) has been located. Travel to the marked location to begin.
LanguageData.Isekai_Hunt_Appeared:
⚔ COMBAT ALERT ⚔
The {0}-Rank {1} has detected your presence! It's hostile — defend yourselves!
LanguageData.Isekai_Hunt_Complete_CanLeave:
<color=#FFD700>✓ CONTRACT COMPLETE</color>
The target has been eliminated. Gather any spoils before departing. Your bounty will be delivered upon return.
<color=#666666>— Adventurer's Guild</color>
LanguageData.Isekai_Reward_XP_Desc: Experience distributed among all participating hunters
LanguageData.Isekai_Hunt_Site_Instructions: Send a caravan to begin the hunt.
LanguageData.Isekai_Hunt_ViewQuestDesc: Open the quest tab to view this contract's details.
LanguageData.Isekai_Hunt_JumpToTargetDesc: Jump camera to the {0} on the map
LanguageData.Isekai_Hunt_TargetSpawned: Hunt Target: {0} has spawned at {1}. Click to jump to target.
LanguageData.Isekai_Respec_NoPawn: This pawn has no Isekai stats to reset.
LanguageData.Isekai_Respec_NoPoints: This pawn has nothing to reset (no stat points or constellation nodes).
LanguageData.Isekai_Respec_Success: {0} used a Respec Orb! {1} stat points returned for reallocation.
LanguageData.Isekai_Respec_Success_Full: {0} used a Respec Orb! {1} stat points and {2} constellation points returned. Class reset — choose a new constellation.
LanguageData.Isekai_Respec_LimitReached: {0} has already used all 3 constellation respecs.
LanguageData.Isekai_Settings_MechScalingDesc: Player mechs inherit stat bonuses from their mechanitor's Isekai level and stats, making them scale with your progression.
LanguageData.Isekai_RimHUD_Tooltip_AllocateStats: This pawn has unspent stat points! Open the Isekai tab to allocate them.
LanguageData.Isekai_WorldBoss_QuestDesc:
<color=#FF4444>⚠ EMERGENCY GUILD ALERT ⚠</color>

A catastrophic entity has been detected — a <color=#9933FF>{0}</color> of such immense power that it has been classified as <color=#9933FF>Nation-rank</color>, a threat that could devastate entire settlements.

The Adventurer's Guild is offering an astronomical bounty for its elimination:
 • <color=#FFD700>{1} XP</color>
 • <color=#FFD700>{2} Silver</color>
 • <color=#FFD700>Legendary equipment, archotech parts, and rare materials</color>

The creature has been sighted approximately {3} tiles from your colony. You have <color=#FF4444>7 days</color> to reach the site before the trail goes cold.

<color=#FF4444>WARNING</color>: <color=#9933FF>Nation-rank</color> creatures possess overwhelming strength. Bring your strongest forces. Other factions may already be engaging the target.

— The Adventurer's Guild, Emergency Division
LanguageData.Isekai_WorldBoss_LetterText:
<color=#FF4444>URGENT — EMERGENCY DISPATCH</color>

To all <color=#FFD700>S-Rank</color> and above adventurers:

A creature of unimaginable power has been located — a <color=#9933FF>{0}</color>, now classified as <color=#9933FF>Nation-rank</color>. Its energy signature alone has set off every detection ward within a hundred-mile radius.

The creature has been spotted approximately {1} tiles from your position. The Guild is scrambling every available asset, but you are our best hope.

<color=#FF4444>This is not a hunt. This is a war.</color>

Proceed with extreme caution. Other factions have been alerted and may engage independently.

Bounty: <color=#FFD700>MAXIMUM CLASSIFICATION</color>

— Adventurer's Guild, Emergency Division
LanguageData.Isekai_WorldBoss_SiteRevealed: <color=#FFD700>[Guild]</color> <color=#9933FF>World Boss</color> territory marked on the world map! A <color=#9933FF>{0}</color> of <color=#9933FF>Nation-rank</color> awaits. Travel there before the trail goes cold.
LanguageData.Isekai_WorldBoss_Arrived_Text:
The ground trembles. The air grows heavy.

<color=#9933FF>{0}</color> towers before you — a <color=#9933FF>Nation-rank</color> entity of terrifying power. Its sheer presence makes the hairs on your neck stand on end.

<color=#FF4444>This is the fight of your life. There is no retreat.</color>

Fight with everything you have.
LanguageData.Isekai_WorldBoss_FactionArrived: {0} has sent <color=#FFD700>{1} warriors</color> to engage the <color=#9933FF>World Boss</color>!
LanguageData.Isekai_WorldBoss_FactionAllied: <color=#FFD700>{0}</color> fights alongside you against the <color=#9933FF>World Boss</color>.
LanguageData.Isekai_WorldBoss_FactionHostile: <color=#FF4444>{0} is hostile!</color> They will attack both you and the <color=#9933FF>World Boss</color>.
LanguageData.Isekai_WorldBoss_WaveTrigger_Text:
The <color=#9933FF>{0}</color> lets out a deafening roar as its body pulses with raw energy!

Its power is fracturing. Copies of the creature — smaller but still devastatingly powerful — are manifesting from the boss's overflowing energy.

<color=#FF4444>S-Rank creatures are spawning! Hold the line!</color>
LanguageData.Isekai_WorldBoss_WaveSpawn: <color=#FF4444>[ALERT]</color> Wave {2}: <color=#FF4444>{0}x S-Rank {1}</color> have spawned from the <color=#9933FF>World Boss</color>'s energy!
LanguageData.Isekai_WorldBoss_Defeated: <color=#FFD700>[GUILD]</color> <color=#9933FF>World Boss {0}</color> has been <color=#FFD700>DEFEATED</color>! An extraordinary victory! The Guild salutes your courage.
LanguageData.Isekai_WorldBoss_Victory_Text:
<color=#FFD700>[GUILD EMERGENCY — RESOLVED]</color>

The <color=#9933FF>Nation-rank</color> threat "<color=#9933FF>{0}</color>" has been eliminated.

The Adventurer's Guild extends its highest honors to all who participated in this legendary hunt.

<color=#FFD700>Rewards Distributed:</color>
• <color=#FFD700>{1} XP</color> shared among all participating adventurers
• <color=#FFD700>{2} silver</color> recovered from the battlefield
• <color=#FFD700>Legendary loot and rare materials have been secured</color>

This victory will be remembered across nations. The Guild salutes your extraordinary courage.
LanguageData.Isekai_WorldBoss_Pending: The Adventurer's Guild has detected a <color=#9933FF>{0}</color> of <color=#9933FF>Nation rank</color>. Accept this quest to receive the coordinates.
LanguageData.Isekai_WorldBoss_Travel: Travel to {0} and engage the <color=#9933FF>World Boss</color>. <color=#FF4444>Time is running out.</color>
LanguageData.Isekai_WorldBoss_Slain: The <color=#9933FF>Nation-rank {0}</color> has been slain. <color=#FFD700>A legendary victory.</color>
LanguageData.Isekai_WorldBoss_Reinforcement_Text:
<color=#FFD700>[GUILD BROADCAST]</color>

A group from {0} has arrived at the <color=#9933FF>World Boss</color> battlefield to join the fight against <color=#9933FF>{1}</color>.

<color=#FF4444>The battle rages on!</color>
LanguageData.Isekai_DetailSelectNode: Select a node to view details
LanguageData.Isekai_Settings_EnableStarFragmentDrops_: Star Fragments drop from elite S/SS/SSS ranked creatures and world bosses. When absorbed by an adventurer, each one grants 1 Star Point and 1 Multiclass Unlock for the Constellation tree.
LanguageData.Isekai_Settings_ConstellationBonusMultip: Scales all stat bonuses from constellation nodes. At 0.50x, a +10% node gives +5%. At 2.00x, it gives +20%. ClassGimmickTier is unaffected.
LanguageData.Isekai_Item_HerosAwakening_Desc: An ancient scroll radiating golden light. When used, it awakens the Protagonist trait within a pawn, granting them x10 XP gain and +2 stat points per level at the cost of social standing.
LanguageData.Isekai_Item_ReincarnationCrystal_Desc: A shimmering crystal containing memories from another life. When used, it resets the pawn's level and stats, then grants the Reincarnated trait — x5 XP gain, +10 star points, and accelerated constellation growth. Constellation tree progress is preserved.
LanguageData.Isekai_Item_VillainsMask_Desc: A sinister mask radiating malevolent energy. When worn, it awakens the Antagonist trait — x8 XP gain and devastating combat power, but the wearer becomes reviled by all.
LanguageData.Isekai_Item_SummoningCircle_Desc: A mystical scroll inscribed with otherworldly runes. Activating it tears open a rift between worlds, summoning a new colonist with the Summoned Hero trait. Does not affect the user.
LanguageData.Isekai_Item_RegressionOrb_Desc: A temporal orb that sends one's consciousness backward. Grants the Regressor trait — x4 XP gain and free constellation respec at will.
LanguageData.Isekai_Trait_SealBroken: {0}'s sealed power has broken free! They surge with overwhelming energy!
LanguageData.Isekai_Trait_Awakening: {0}'s dormant potential has finally awakened! All stats increased by 50%!
LanguageData.Isekai_Trait_UndyingSaved: {0} should have died, but the Undying trait saved them!
LanguageData.Isekai_Trait_EchoActive: {0} learns from defeat — XP doubled for 3 days!
LanguageData.Isekai_SummonHero_Text: A summoning circle has torn open a rift between worlds!\n\n{0} has been pulled from another dimension and joins your colony as a Summoned Hero.
LanguageData.Isekai_Reincarnation_Reset: {0} has been reincarnated! Level and stats reset to base — constellation progress preserved.
LanguageData.Isekai_Forge_Disabled: The Forge System is disabled in mod settings.
LanguageData.Isekai_Forge_Downgrade: {0} failed refinement and was downgraded to +{1}.
LanguageData.Isekai_Rune_SelectEquipment: Select equipment to view rune slots
LanguageData.Isekai_Rune_RemoveConfirm: Remove {0} from {1}?\n\nThe rune will be DESTROYED permanently.
LanguageData.Isekai_Rune_NoRunesAvailable: No compatible rune items found on the map. Craft runes at the Runic Station bills tab.
LanguageData.Isekai_Gizmo_OpenForge_Desc: Open the Refinement Forge to refine weapons and armor.
LanguageData.Isekai_Gizmo_OpenRunicStation_Desc: Open the Runic Station to apply or remove runes on equipment.
LanguageData.Isekai_Stat_RefinedDesc: This item has been refined at the Refinement Forge to +{0}.
LanguageData.Isekai_Stat_RefinementMaxHint: Refinement can be increased up to +10 at the Refinement Forge.
LanguageData.Isekai_Stat_RuneSlotsDesc: This item has {0} rune slot(s). {1} currently in use.
LanguageData.Isekai_Stat_RuneHint: Runes can be applied at a Runic Station.
LanguageData.Isekai_Forge_ConfirmDestroy: Refining to +{0} has a {1}% chance to DESTROY the item.\n\nProceed?
